top_signals.title: Stranded Oil Is Streaming Out of Hormuz as Deal Takes Effect
top_signals.summary: A growing stream of stranded oil is making its way out of the Strait of Hormuz while Kuwait said it will start ramping up production, as the US-Iran interim peace deal sparks a flurry of activity that is already pushing Middle East flows toward pre-war levels.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve rolls out proposing rulemaking requiring stablecoin issuers to maintain customer identification program
top_signals.summary: The Fed rolled out a rule requiring stablecoin issuers to have a program in place to identify customers to combat illicit finance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Read the 14-point memorandum of understanding between the United States and Iran
top_signals.summary: The 14-point memorandum of understanding between the United States and Iran leaves contentious issues between the countries unresolved.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: A Wave of Persian Gulf Oil Set to Leave Asian Refiners Swamped - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: A Wave of Persian Gulf Oil Set to Leave Asian Refiners Swamped  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
